case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS SUNG CHUL CHOUNG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $715.21 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT SUNG CHUL CHOUNG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SUNG CHUL CHOUNG
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO SUNG CHO CHONG RETURNED UNCLAIMED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUNG CHUL CHOUNG $715.21 PRINCIPAL, $16.29 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $731.50, CIVIL CODE SECTION 1719 DAMAGES INCLUDED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SUNG CHUL CHOUNG
